Off Calendar Jul-07-2009 Continued To Aug-31-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-16-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Donald T. Dunning, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Western Surety Company, a corporation.
No appearance by defendant Maureen C. O'Neill, an individual, Maureen C. O'Neill, Trustee of the James O'Neill Marital Trust, Maureen C. O'Neill, Trustee of the James O'Neill Residential Trust, and Maureen C. O'Neill, Trustee of the O'Neill Family Trust.
Amended default was entered on January 23, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on May 29, 2009.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Avoca Trucking & Excavating, Inc., a corporation, was filed on August 15, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on July 6, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Western Surety Company, a corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Maureen C. O'Neill, an individual, Maureen C. O'Neill, Trustee of the James O'Neill Marital Trust, Maureen C. O'Neill, Trustee of the James O'Neill Residential Trust, and Maureen C. O'Neill, Trustee of the O'Neill Family Trust as follows:

Damages/Principal - $50,923.68.
Prejudgment Interest - $10,071.90.
Attorney's Fees - $1,909.23.
Costs - $463.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $63,367.81.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
